title: hyptis australis
intro: Hyptis australis, also known as Brazilian rosemary or Brazilian hyptis, is a plant species that belongs to the Lamiaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antispasmodic effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in digestion. Hyptis australis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or essential oils, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
